title: Catering Foil 450mm x 75Meter - Commercial Quality Aluminium Foil Food Wrap - 250foot
features: Metal kitchen foil - High tensile strength - 11 micron
Suitable for use in the refridgerator, freezer and oven.
Perfect for cooking or packaging food for freshness
Strong wipe clean cutterbox complete with a plastic blade
Cutterbox blade makes dispensing quick and easy
description: Catering Foil is the ultimate addition to any kitchen! With an impressively high tensile strength, ideal for use in cooking and covering roasting tins.
